page: Microsoft Azure F2as_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Fasv7 server family. It is powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type does not include any local storage, meaning it relies entirely on external storage options, though it is Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the instance does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no onboard GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or parallel computing workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the F2as_v7 offers a balanced resource profile for entry-level workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without the performance variability associated with shared-core or burstable instances. This configuration is appropriate for general-purpose workloads, lightweight web serving, small databases, and basic development or testing environments that require a stable 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio.
description: Microsoft Azure F2as_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Fasv7 family, utilizing an AMD processor and the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage but is Premium Storage capable, requiring external volumes for persistent data. It also lacks complimentary public IPv4 addresses and GPU accelerators. The dedicated CPU allocation provides stable, predictable performance compared to burstable alternatives. Given its balanced resource distribution and lack of local storage, the F2as_v7 is designed for general-purpose applications, lightweight web servers, small database instances, and development environments that do not require high-speed local disk I/O or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F2as_v7 is a Fasv7 family virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, designed for general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure F2as_v7 is a Fasv7 virtual machine with 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability for general workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine with a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and premium storage compatibility for stable, general-purpose workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated AMD vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
8.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Suited for general-purpose computing, lightweight web serving, and development
